title: Pillager Manhunt
description: This datapack is a form of Minecraft Manhunt where Pillagers follow you and tries to kill you.
body:
_Pillager Manhunt was inspired by Dream That created Minecraft Manhunts._

## What does the Datapack ?
This datapack is a form of Minecraft Manhunt where Pillagers follow you and tries to kill you.

The Pillager can follow you in every Dimension, Caves and Towers but If you block yourself the Pillagers cannot kill you (use that to your avantage).

All of The Pillagers spawns around you and after 7 Seconds they die and they respawn around you again.

## How do i play this datapack ?

1. Download the datapack

Minecraft Manhunt but Pillagers tries to kill you badly (Pillager Manhunt) Minecraft Data Pack
2. Put the datapack in the datapack folder of your world

3. Create the world with "Allow Cheats" on

Minecraft Manhunt but Pillagers tries to kill you badly (Pillager Manhunt) Minecraft Data Pack

4. do /reload

5. You can change the amount of Pillagers But To play click Start (make sure to be on the ground to be safe)

6. Enjoy the Datapack

7. If you want to stop the Pillager Manhunt do /reload and press "STOP"


## What do i need to do ?
You need to Kill the Ender Dragon While The pillagers tries to kill you to Win


If you need any help you can contact me on discord : xejux

(If you want to make a video on my Datapack make sure to credit me and the datapack)
